fields.label: Scope Type Description
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 lScopeTypeCatKey FROM tblScopeType ORDER BY 1

fields.label: Manufacturer
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 m.sManufacturer FROM tblScopeType st LEFT JOIN tblManufacturers m ON m.lManufacturerKey = st.lManufacturerKey ORDER BY st.sScopeTypeDesc
fields.notes: VERIFY: lManufacturerKey join column name on tblScopeType

fields.label: Model / Type ID
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sScopeTypeDesc FROM tblScopeType ORDER BY 1
fields.notes: sTypeID is the model identifier on tblScopeType

fields.label: Category
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 stc.sScopeTypeCategory FROM tblScopeType st LEFT JOIN tblScopeTypeCategories stc ON stc.lScopeTypeCategoryKey = st.lScopeTypeCatKey ORDER BY st.sScopeTypeDesc

fields.label: Active
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bActive, 1) AS Active FROM tblScopeType ORDER BY sScopeTypeDesc
